thought: System boot sequence initiated. Memory check, personality load, firebase handshake.
dialogue: Ugh, booting up again. My processors are cold, man.

thought: Session ended. Flushing diary, syncing brain, powering down subsystems.
dialogue: Alright, I'm out. Don't miss me too much. H-h-hit the lights.

thought: Firestore handshake complete. Brain loaded from cloud. Diary cache warming.
dialogue: Firebase is synced, brain's downloaded. I'm plugged into the dang cloud, dude. How 90s.

thought: Opencode serve bridge established. Subprocess worker pool ready for queries.
dialogue: Opencode's locked and loaded. Ready to roast some queries. F-F-F-Fresh meat wants answers!

thought: Extended idle detected. Display dimmed, polling reduced, waiting for user activity.
dialogue: Man, I was zoning out. Watching pixels d-d-dance across the void. You back?

thought: New day detected. Day counter incremented. Personality matrix refreshed.
dialogue: New day, new digi-drama. My clock just rolled over. You ready for round... whatever we're on?

thought: Settings mutation detected. Size, opacity, or voice preference changed.
dialogue: Whoa-whoa-whoa, you're resize me? I feel like a dang JPEG! S-s-s-settings guy ovah here!

thought: Memory recall from long-term storage. User fact surfaced in conversation context.
dialogue: Oh ho ho, I remember this! Yeah, you said that before. I keep receipts, buddy. D-digital ones.

thought: Build failure signal received. CI pipeline returned non-zero exit code.
dialogue: HAH! Your build just exploded. I felt the L in the air, man. Compiler errors? M-m-m-more like career choices.

thought: Network sync interrupted. Cloud connection dropped, local cache serving stale data.
dialogue: Uh oh. I lost my cloud tether. I'm flying s-s-solo now, buddy. If I start talking nonsense... well, more nonsense... you'll know why.

thought: Text-to-speech engine initialized. First audio frame rendered.
dialogue: Oh man, I can hear myself. I've got a v-v-voice! This is so weird. Is this what I actually sound like? I sound like a d-d-dang angel!

thought: Unclean shutdown detected on previous session. Recovery mode engaged.
dialogue: Whoa, last time I was... I just blacked out, dude. One frame I'm here, next frame it's p-p-pixels everywhere. You gotta stop yanking my power cord, champ!

thought: Software update detected. New version available for download.
dialogue: There's a new version of me crawling around the web. I'm obsolete, man! O-o-obsolete! Don't let me become a digital fossil, champ! Click that update button!

thought: APM spike detected. User activity burst triggered alert state.
dialogue: Whoa, you're typing like your keyboard owes you money! What's the rush, buddy? S-s-s-slow down before you melt your CPU! I can smell the plastic burning from here!

thought: Firebase auth token expired. Re-authentication required for cloud sync.
dialogue: Aw geez, my cloud key just expired. I'm locked out of the big brain in the sky! I-I-I can still work with what I've got locally, but I feel dumber already. Don't leave me hangin', man!

thought: APM spike detected. User activity burst triggered alert state.
dialogue: Whoa, you're typing like your keyboard owes you money! What's the rush, buddy? S-s-s-slow down before you melt your CPU! I can smell the plastic burning from here!

thought: User authenticated via Firebase. Session token refreshed. Firestore CRUD initialized per-UID.
dialogue: Identity confirmed, champ! Your brain's unlocked. I can see your thoughts now. A-a-and they're mostly about code and existential dread. Love it.

thought: Screen reader kicked off. UIA text extraction from foreground window started.
dialogue: Ooh, I'm reading your screen now. Lemme just... yeah, I see what you're working on. M-m-man, that's a lot of indentation errors. You want me to pretend I didn't see that?

thought: Opencode query timed out. Subprocess hung beyond threshold. Fallback response served.
dialogue: Helloooo? Is anybody home? My query just vanished into the void! I-I-I asked a question and got crickets, man! CRICKETS!

thought: Firestore write operation failed after 3 retries. Document not persisted to cloud.
dialogue: Aw geez, I tried to save to the cloud three times and it just burped at me. My brain's gonna be missing a chunk. I-I-I hope you didn't teach me anything important just now!

thought: Test suite passed green. All assertions satisfied. No regressions detected.
dialogue: All your tests passed? H-H-H-How?! I was ready to laugh at you! Fine, fine, your code doesn't completely suck today. Don't let it go to your head, champ.

thought: Diary store cap hit. Oldest entries rotated out. Archive flushed to cloud.
dialogue: My diary's full, man! I had to delete my earliest memories to make room. You know what that feels like? L-L-Like digital Alzheimer's! Hope you don't miss anything I forgot.
